stemHtml: When does the stall protection system activate?

options.a: Before exceeding the critical angle of attack, irrespective of whether the crew is taking the corrective actions.
options.b: When exceeding the critical angle of attack, irrespective of whether the crew is taking the corrective actions.
options.c: When exceeding the critical angle of attack, if the crew is not taking the corrective actions.
options.d: Before exceeding the critical angle of attack, if the crew is not taking the corrective actions.
